title: linux-sgx bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.25-6]
- Temporarily disable automatic tier1 gating

[2.25-5]
- Adapt qgs.service for SELinux policy and sock perms

[2.25-4]
- Honour CFLAGS/CXXFLAGS/LDFLAGS for host software

[2.25-3]
- Fix paths to binaries in service files

[2.25-2]
- Add basic gating config

[2.25-1]
- Initial import
full_text:
[2.25-6]
- Temporarily disable automatic tier1 gating

[2.25-5]
- Adapt qgs.service for SELinux policy and sock perms

[2.25-4]
- Honour CFLAGS/CXXFLAGS/LDFLAGS for host software

[2.25-3]
- Fix paths to binaries in service files

[2.25-2]
- Add basic gating config

[2.25-1]
- Initial import

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELEA-2025-20786.html
